transition_log.note: Resolved 4 open cross-domain decisions in decisions.md: (1) DB topology = one shared SQLite file with registry_/tool_/provider_/policy_ prefixes, one handle, no ATTACH, no cross-package FK (DAG-neutral baseline that agent-compiler already assumes); (2) context-condition eval = ALL matching included with deterministic total order (position, version, slug), is_required unmatched => error; (3) keep both context_condition + context_rules with a single shared predicate evaluator + additive union (junction wins dedup); (4) version pin is per-reference (slug, version_pin?), null=latest-at-resolve, identical at junction/policy/experiment sites. Architecture guard passes 3/3 (exit 0). No decision changes the DAG.

Created @adhd/agent-registry package skeleton at packages/ai/agent-registry/. Files: project.json (Nx name agent-registry, tags layer:ai+platform:node, @nx/js:tsc build with drizzle asset glob, release block), package.json (name @adhd/agent-registry, deps drizzle-orm@0.45.2, better-sqlite3@12.10.0, zod@4.4.3 matching agent-mcp versions), tsconfig.json + tsconfig.lib.json (mirroring agent-mcp, ESNext/ES2022/Bundler moduleResolution), src/db/client.ts (better-sqlite3 WAL, reads REGISTRY_DATABASE_PATH|DATABASE_PATH, Decision 1 shared-file comment), src/db/schema.ts (drizzle-orm/sqlite-core imports, no tables yet, per-state comments), src/index.ts (barrel: client + schema re-exports). tsconfig.base.json: added single @adhd/agent-registry line only. nx build agent-registry passed exit 0.

Added registry_prompt_types (text PK slug, description, is_system integer) and registry_prompt_components (composite PK slug+version via index, type FK to prompt_types, integer version default 1, content, is_shared integer, created_at/updated_at) to schema.ts. Created ComponentStore with create, read(slug), readVersion(slug,n), version(slug,newContent), list({type?,shared?}) methods plus upsertType/readType. Added migrate-runner.ts and migrate.ts (FK-safe migration runner mirroring agent-mcp pattern). Generated drizzle migration 0000_third_nitro.sql into packages/ai/agent-registry/drizzle/. Added vite.config.ts with pool:forks+fileParallelism:false for better-sqlite3 stability. Updated project.json with @nx/vite:test executor (needed for --testFile flag pass-through). component-store.test.ts drives a real on-disk SQLite file (never :memory:), closes and reopens the handle to prove persistence [inv:reopen-proves-persistence], asserts old version rows survive after version() bump [inv:version-retained], and covers create/read/readVersion/version/list. All 15 tests passed (exit 0). Deliverables committed at 3d14ca7.

Added registry_taxonomy_categories (slug PK, name, description, position integer, parent_slug self-FK) and registry_agents (slug PK, display_name, description, status text, model_hint text NOT FK, taxonomy_category in-pkg FK, default_posture, created_at, updated_at) tables to schema.ts. Generated drizzle migration 0001_agents_and_taxonomy.sql. Created AgentStore (create/read/update/delete/list with category+status filter) and TaxonomyStore (createCategory/listCategories ordered by position ASC). agent-store.test.ts: 15 tests, all green, exit 0. Proves persistence via reopen, position ordering regression guard, category/status filter correctness. Committed a753e62.

Built registry_agent_components junction (position, version_pin, context_condition, is_required; agent_slug FK; component_slug logical-only). CompositionStore.resolveComposition: Decision-2 ALL-INCLUDED evaluator (position ASC, version DESC, slug ASC total order), Decision-4 version-pin resolution (null=latest-at-resolve, int=exact). REQUIRED_COMPONENT_EXCLUDED CompositionError for is_required+unmatched. 6 tests pass (real on-disk DB, reopen-proves-persistence, order/pin/context + throws). Migration 0002_agent_components_junction.sql generated. Committed eefea94.
built + test passed (9/9, exit 0) + committed daf9b02
built + test passed (9/9, exit 0) + committed daf9b02

dod_provenance.note: DoD derived from docs/plan/agent-registry/{GOAL,SCOPE,DATA_MODEL,SEED_DATA}.md; confirmed by team-lead via plan-authoring task 2026-06-22
